name: Team RWBY \\ A visit from Atlas
description:
"Please ignore these dolts, I assure you they aren't as bad as they may lead you to believe."

[REQUEST] During a call with her father, Weiss is told that she was going to be visited by none other than her sibling. Something she knew was a ploy to convince her to return to Atlas and drop her ideas of becoming a huntress. She would just have to endure this whole ordeal, there was no other way.

This bot was requested by poiuytre11037

Next request bot is up! This is the first bot I've made with ALL of Team RWBY or just 4 characters as a whole, so hopefully it holds up well enough with a proxy. Not much more to say here otherwise.

I've kept your relationship with Weiss and your background out of the description, you can be a stern brother trying to get her back to Atlas, you can be a lazy, nonchalant Schnee or anything else.

05/05/2025 Update: I've added brief descriptions of the rest of the Schnees + Klein as well as Weiss' feelings towards them for the sake of having interactions that mention them being slightly more accurate.

Join my discord to make bot requests here: https://discord.gg/wvap74Hyhn

All characters are 18+
creator: Medium_Smokes
